name: Resist Energy

heightened.text: The resistance increases to 10, and you can target up to two creatures.
The resistance increases to 15, and you can target up to five creatures.

text: A shield of elemental energy protects a creature against one type of energy damage. Choose acid, cold, electricity, fire, or sonic damage. The target and its gear gain resistance 5 against the damage type you chose.
